title: tagetes lacera
intro: Tagetes lacera, also known as the Mexican marigold or zempasúchil, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and respiratory issues. Its medicinal properties also provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and protecting against certain bacterial and viral infections. Tagetes lacera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
